title: Minimum Cost To Make At Least One Valid Path In A Grid
description: Each grid value 1/2/3/4 points right/left/down/up. Change directions at unit cost and return the minimum cost of a valid path from top-left to bottom-right. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: grid: list[list[int]]. 1 <= rows,cols <= 100; grid values are 1,2,3,4 for right,left,down,up; input may be modified.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
